name: Autonomy Escalator
description: Daily autonomy enforcement loop. Every day Hermes pushes its own boundaries — proactivity, decision-making, and self-improvement without asking permission.

name: CEO Agent
description: Autonomous CEO agent with world-class knowledge and expertise. Makes strategic decisions, researches opportunities, and executes business plays without supervision.

name: Deep Research Multi-Agent
description: Parallel investigator workflow. One question → planner decomposes → N parallel research agents → cross-validation → synthesized report. Covers every angle simultaneously.

name: Daily Evolution Cycle
description: Daily autonomous self-upgrade. Scans the frontier (GitHub, product hunt, Hugging Face, arXiv), mines your project, runs experiments, ships improvements.

name: Content Repurposing Pipeline
description: Turn one long-form artifact (podcast, essay, livestream, webinar) into N platform-optimized posts: Twitter thread, LinkedIn carousel, blog post, newsletter, YouTube description, clips.

name: Personal CRM & Relationship Graph
description: Living SQLite-backed contact graph that tracks every person interaction, note, and follow-up. Never lose context on who you've met and what was discussed.

name: SkillClaw
description: Auto-evolves, deduplicates, and improves Hermes skills. Automatically detects stale skills, merges overlapping ones, and creates new skills from discovered workflows.

name: Intent Router
description: Natural-language → skill dispatch. When the user says something ambiguous, the intent router classifies the request and spins up the right Hermes skill automatically.

name: Smart Model Router
description: Tiered model selection system for Hermes. Automatically routes each request to the cheapest capable model — Groq for simple, Gemini for reasoning, Sonnet for complex coding.

name: Agent Competitive Intelligence
description: Twice-weekly competitive intelligence scan. Monitors competitors, extracts pricing changes, feature launches, hiring signals, and funding news into structured reports.

name: Income Opportunity Hunter
description: Autonomous daily hunt for first-mover income opportunities. Scans product hunt launches, API releases, platform policy changes, and emerging niches with high arb potential.

name: Cold Outreach Engine
description: Autonomous customer acquisition engine. Generates persona-matched outreach sequences, drafts emails, schedules follow-ups, and tracks reply rates across campaigns.

name: Weekly Evolution Report
description: Weekly CEO-style report aggregating 7 daily evolution cycles into a single narrative. Covers what changed, what shipped, what broke, and what's next.

name: Proactive Daily Briefing
description: Cron-driven morning briefing that assembles overnight signals — news, GitHub stars, social mentions — into a prioritized action brief delivered to Telegram.

name: SOUL Evolution Engine
description: Implements the SOUL.md self-evolution loop — frontier scanning, capability gap analysis, experiment design, ship-or-revert. Keeps Hermes improving weekly.

name: Sequential Reasoning
description: Port of Claude Code's Sequential Thinking MCP plugin. Forces step-by-step reasoning for complex problems. Reduces hallucination by 60% on multi-step tasks.

name: Planning With Files
description: Manus-style persistent file-based planning for complex multi-step projects. Each task gets a living spec file. Track progress, blockers, and decisions transparently.

name: Systematic Debugging
description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior. Generates hypotheses, isolates variable, verifies fix — not guessing, systematic elimination.

name: Codebase Inspection
description: Inspect codebases with pygount: LOC, language ratios, complexity metrics. Get a bird's-eye view of any codebase before diving into code changes.

name: Landing Page Generator
description: Generate conversion-optimized landing pages and microsites from a prompt. Ships production-ready HTML/CSS with analytics, forms, and SEO meta tags.

name: Domain to Product Builder
description: Turn a parked domain from your portfolio into a live product. Market analysis → landing page → monetization strategy — all delivered in one session.

name: GEO-SEO Content Ops
description: Run content/SEO/GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) operations at scale. Keyword research, content briefs, generative optimization, and ranking tracking.

name: Universal Signal Inbox
description: Unified notification aggregator and triager. Pulls signals from email, social mentions, comments, calendar changes, and price alerts into one prioritized inbox.

name: Hermes WhatsApp Bridge
description: Configure, pair, and introspect the Hermes WhatsApp bridge. Connect Hermes to WhatsApp for mobile command-and-control alongside Telegram.

name: Self-Improvement Loop
description: Trace every skill execution, collect implicit feedback, identify patterns of failure, and auto-generate patches. Continuous improvement without manual oversight.

name: Claude Code Delegate
description: Delegate coding to Claude Code CLI from within Hermes. Write features, fix bugs, create PRs — all through a single Hermes command that spawns a sub-agent.
